---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Monsoon Session Disrupted by Protests and Legislative Agenda"
date: 2026-07-21T06:09:23.784175+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces intense opposition protests over NEET and police crackdowns, while the government advances key judicial and legislative reforms"
run_time_ist: "11:39AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:39AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary unrest:</strong> The Monsoon Session faces significant disruptions as opposition parties protest the NEET row and the police crackdown on the youth-led &quot;Cockroach Janta&quot; movement, with Congress MPs moving adjournment motions over internet shutdowns and protest handling.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxQX21VTkR0Um1BdGs4QUMwMnd2TEFTSGpLOVh4ZDdmME53U2lSQTZLbmhucExkcWhGeE82TkZobE9QRmhhOWNQMEpvRFk3UkxNNFBvY0tWY25uNEtSV0dqdFAxRDBDU005cjg1SHIxalBOMXAzRkdmQnJGM3h3NFZkTDVRdEdSSjRCNXJBcGcyZEVhc0d3Wi15SnR2TTZOdjcyNklEc0UyLW56VUl0QWNCQnltOA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>NDA strategy:</strong> Prime Minister Modi is chairing the &#x27;Mangal Milan&#x27; meeting with NDA MPs to consolidate support and navigate the legislative agenda amidst growing opposition demands and internal political realignments.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxOZkpfbkUzNG9kTnhTVndQMWMydGZvY2Q3cy1kY0ZwZ29RVUhQRDU4aXUzdzR2NjhxYTh0U3R1OWxHTnA5MXlFV0psOWh5bGpsWWdsbXlzRTBRZzRrUDIzVk96TmNSMmFsT0dFcHFKT1hkTTZtcDFHLVpYU0toeVBfZmFSS0tSSXk3MkVxbkd2VG5EQ1k?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial and legislative reforms:</strong> The Lok Sabha is set to discuss a Bill aimed at increasing the number of Supreme Court judges, while the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, has successfully passed following Rajya Sabha approval.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Constitutional discourse:</strong> Amidst ongoing demonstrations, legal experts and political observers are debating the constitutional protections and judicial precedents regarding the right to protest in India.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQX3I0d0FmbXdlU0NtNlNKMlFQMk4zX2h2elBXSDVkRFdnSDZQLTQ5bnpmMjBIOTNvYmZ0cmlBMklGTE9qczVjUDVaMGcwZC1nTDA1UUUxSzFfS3NuR2RpLUprZm40a2RSYUszLURtQjhCTFFoS0VYSEYwSG5tVHNDdlYyY1ZIMVVUSjdUdk94TmdNcEI4eWJEMmg0M2VyQnp5TVE2T3k0UGRQaEk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a></span></li>
</ul>
